name: integration_acquisition_microsaas_idea_email_deli
method: [ACQUISITION] MicroSaaS idea: email deliverability checker. Thoughts?

phases.name: core_build
steps: SMTP mailbox existence check via smtplib (no API cost)
MX record + SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS validation via dnspython
Blacklist check against 50+ RBLs via dns.resolver (free)

phases.name: monetize
steps: Wire Stripe Payment Link for $9/mo tier
Firebase rate-limiting for 10 checks/day free tier

phases.name: launch
steps: Deploy to surge.sh with live demo widget
Generate 3 tweets + 1 thread from build process
